basic_details.job_title: LNIPE NERC Guwahati Walk-in Interview 2026 - 30 Contractual Posts, Apply Online by 20 June 2026
basic_details.short_information: Lakshmibai National Institute of Physical Education (LNIPE), North East Regional Centre (NERC), Guwahati has invited eligible candidates for a Walk-in Interview for 18 different contractual posts on a purely contractual basis for one year or till regular appointments are made (whichever is earlier). The online application portal closes on 20 June 2026. Appointment carries no right or likelihood of permanent employment.

important_dates.interview_date: To be published on recruitment portal

age_limit.details: The age for all posts is reckoned as on 01 January 2026 and must be below 69 years. No further age limit details are specified in the notification.

how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online through the institute's dedicated recruitment portal before the deadline. Follow these steps:
Visit the official recruitment portal: https://recruitment.lnipeassam.edu.in/
Register as a new user using a valid email ID and mobile number.
Log in and fill in the application form for the relevant post.
Upload all required documents — bio-data/resume along with copies of educational certificates, mark sheets, and experience documents (originals to be brought at the time of joining).
Submit the application on or before 20 June 2026.
The list of eligible candidates will be published on https://recruitment.lnipeassam.edu.in/ only.
The Walk-in Interview schedule and venue for offline posts will also be communicated through the same portal.
Candidates should keep a copy of their submitted application and registration details for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for LNIPE NERC Guwahati Walk-in Interview 2026?
faq.answer: The online application portal closes on 20 June 2026. Candidates must submit their application through https://recruitment.lnipeassam.edu.in/ on or before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many posts are available in LNIPE NERC Guwahati Walk-in Interview 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 30 different post are open, including Doctor, Internal Audit Officer, Physiotherapist, Nurse, Computer Instructor, Mess Supervisor, Supervisor (B&R), Assistant Accountant, Junior Hindi Translator, Fitness Trainer, IT Assistant, Lower Division Clerk, Junior Clerk, Driver, Electrician, Cook, Plumber, and Hostel In-charge.

faq.question: Q3. What is the nature of employment offered by LNIPE NERC Guwahati?
faq.answer: All posts are purely contractual for a period of one year or till regular appointments are made (whichever is earlier). There is no right or likelihood of permanent employment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for LNIPE NERC Guwahati recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Age is reckoned as on 01 January 2026 and must be below 69 years for all the posts mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Doctor post at LNIPE NERC Guwahati?
faq.answer: The Doctor/Physician post carries a monthly salary of ₹70,000/-. This is the highest salary offered in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. Is the Walk-in Interview conducted online or offline?
faq.answer: Both modes are in use. Posts such as Doctor, Internal Audit Officer, Physiotherapist, Nurse, Computer Instructor, Mess Supervisor, Supervisor B&R, Assistant Accountant, Junior Hindi Translator, Fitness Trainer, and IT Assistant will be interviewed in virtual mode. Posts like Lower Division Clerk, Junior Clerk, Driver, Electrician, Cook, Plumber, and Hostel In-charge require candidates to appear in offline mode.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the Walk-in Interview date and venue for LNIPE NERC 2026?
faq.answer: The schedule and venue for the Walk-in Interview will be published on the institute's official recruitment portal at https://recruitment.lnipeassam.edu.in/ in due course.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the LNIPE NERC Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring their bio-data/resume along with originals and copies of all certificates, mark sheets, and experience documents related to educational qualifications and work experience for verification at the time of joining.
